scenario: A company uses Microsoft Dataverse and Microsoft Azure. You need to design inbound and outbound integrations between Dataverse and Azure services.
q: Which integration method should you use for each scenario? Select the appropriate options from the drop-down menus.

rows.s: To enable an external system to read and write data in Microsoft Dataverse
To perform processing synchronously in an Azure Function when a record is updated in Dataverse
To securely integrate Dataverse with an on-premise application

why: Use a Custom API to let an external system read and write Dataverse data (inbound): you define the API and the external system calls it to operate on Dataverse. Use a Webhook to process synchronously in an Azure Function when a row is updated (outbound): a webhook can run synchronously on the Dataverse event and call an HTTP-triggered Azure Function. Use Azure Relay to securely integrate Dataverse with an on-premises application behind a firewall without opening inbound ports.
